examples: He was critical of the people, disparaging of their crude manners.
With other audiences you mustn't attempt to cut in with humor as they will resent an outsider making disparaging remarks about their canteen or their chairman.
He laughed when I did a disparaging laugh wondering aloud at what kind of American I was.
He was accused of telling an officer to send an email disparaging a councillor.
Those attacking the FBI are disparaging one of our country's most successful weapons against terrorism.
